scripts.build:bundle: bun run build:wasm && wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.build:workerd: bun run build:bundle && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='dist';const f=fs.readdirSync(d).find(f=>f.endsWith('.wasm'));if(f){fs.renameSync(d+'/'+f,d+'/worker.wasm');let js=fs.readFileSync(d+'/index.js','utf8');js=js.replace(f,'worker.wasm');fs.writeFileSync(d+'/index.js',js);}"
